source.reference: Litz estimate G7 BC~0.155 (M855A1 62gr enhanced FMJ, steel-core construction, Applied Ballistics)
source.methodology: BC values sourced from Bryan Litz's Applied Ballistics published Doppler radar measurements and form factor analysis.

notes: M855A1 62-gr enhanced FMJ. Frag threshold ~2400 fps. G7 BC ~0.155 (Litz estimate, enhanced construction). Chamber pressure: 430 MPa.
